creator: moonlapse81@gmail.com
text:
Currently, musicpd port has unconditional option for building documentation, with
meson argument -Ddocumentation=enabled, which results in numerous sphinx packages/ports to be built first, which prior to sphinx, of course, builds python ( and it's deps, etc ). For small embedded systems or even on normal systems, it maybe better to switch to conditional documentation build, however enabled by default for ease update, but which can be turned off for a curious builder. Please review and consider this change for next version update, whenever it happens.
